prose:
Aniline frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`. SCF converged (9 cycles).
HOMO = -5.553772 eV, LUMO = -0.2489544 eV → **gap ≈ 5.3048177 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
No warnings reported.
